response.step_by_step_log: I analyzed the video and identified the intro screen and the main song performance. The song was identified from the on-screen text '翔べ!ガンダム' (Tobe! Gundam) from the Mobile Suit Gundam franchise. I used the search query '"翔べ!ガンダム" Mobile Suit Gundam Japanese and English lyrics' to find the official lyrics for the song. The video structure was divided into intro, performance, and outro/monologue scenes based on the content.
response.global_summary: A 3D live performance video featuring VTuber Suou Patra, starting with an intro title card followed by her performance of the classic anime theme song "Tobe! Gundam". The video concludes with a short monologue by the performer.

scenes.description: Video intro with title card for Suou Patra Birthday 3D Live 2025.
Suou Patra performs 'Tobe! Gundam' on stage with a large pink mascot prop. The song title appears in the lower third.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
燃え上がれ 燃え上がれ 燃え上がれ ガンダム
君よ 走れ
まだ怒りに燃える 闘志があるなら
巨大な敵を 打てよ 打てよ 打てよ
正義の怒りを ぶつけろ ガンダム
機動戦士 ガンダム
立ち上がれ 立ち上がれ 立ち上がれ ガンダム
君よ 叫べ
まだ絶望に沈む 悲しみあるなら
恐怖をはらって ゆけよ ゆけよ ゆけよ
渦巻く命を 燃やせ ガンダム
機動戦士 ガンダム
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
Burn! Burn! Burn! Gundam!
You, run!
If you still have fighting spirit burning with rage,
Strike the giant enemy! Strike! Strike! Strike!
Unleash your righteous rage, Gundam!
Mobile Suit Gundam!
Stand up! Stand up! Stand up! Gundam!
You, shout!
If you still have sadness sinking in despair,
Shake off the fear! Go! Go! Go!
Burn your swirling life, Gundam!
Mobile Suit Gundam!

scenes.description: Performance ends, followed by a short monologue from Suou Patra and the closing screen.
